title: February 17
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}} {{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}
'''February 17''' is the 48th day of the year. There are 317 days remaining, 318 in leap years.
</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[Don Scardino]] is born.
*[[1981]] – [[Joseph Gordon-Levitt]] is born.
*[[1991]] – [[Ed Sheeran]] is born.
*[[1993]] – [[Jett Lucas]] is born.
*[[1998]] – ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]'' released.
*[[1999]] – [[Vader's Quest 1|''Vader's Quest'' 1]] published.
*1999 – [[Star Wars (1998) 3|''Star Wars'' (1998) 3]] published.
*[[2005]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine 55]]'' released to newsstands.
*[[2010]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 50|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 50]] published.
*[[2016]] – [[Ray West (sound editor)|Ray West]] dies.
*2016 – [[Star Wars (2015) 16|''Star Wars'' (2015) 16]] published.
*2016 – "[[Homecoming]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*2016 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 15|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 15]] published in Germany.
*[[2019]] – "[[The Core Problem]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2023]] – The [[Dark Troopers Unit Expansion]] and [[Moff Gideon Commander Expansion]] are released
*[[2026]] – ''[[Star Wars: Hidden Empire Omnibus]]'' published.
